title: Agartha Totem
description: The only totem that can save you
body:
Changes the texture of Totem of Undying with Yakub, the black scientist within the beliefs of the Nation of Islam.

Sound effects are changed to a 5 second snippet of this song:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3hVXt9NYiJA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Make sure to follow and save if you like this resource pack.
